title: Buchi
description: This is a fun survival modpack that is for 1.19.2 forge with some performance mods to ensure no lags.
body:
This is a fun survival modpack that you can play with your friends. there are spells and magic items with the Easy Magic mod, tech mods like Create or Immersive Engineering. for exploration theres terralith, tectonic oh the biomes youll go which terraforms the overworld, adds mountains, volcanos, new villages and more. theres also the bettercombat mod that changes the combat system to be similar to Minecraft Dungeons. Also Farmer's Delight that adds ton of new unique food variants to the game and ways to get them.

Your Goal is to become the best mage in your world with different kind of machines and factories.


Important Mods:

Create: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create
Corpse: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse
Macaw's Furniture: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture
Macaw's Windows: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows
